x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Discovery-sourced install data ensures Now Assist SAM AI analysis is based on accurate, current software inventory. Without automated discovery, AI recommendations are based on potentially stale or incomplete manual data, reducing the reliability of license optimization suggestions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_sam_sw_install"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No software install records found", finding: "No software install records found. Discovery integration cannot be assessed." }; } var gaDisc = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_sam_sw_install"); gaDisc.addQuery("discovery_source", "!=", ""); gaDisc.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaDisc.query(); var withDisc = gaDisc.next() ? parseInt(gaDisc.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withDisc / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of installs have a discovery source (" + withDisc + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of software installs have a discovery source. Now Assist SAM AI analysis is based on accurate, automatically discovered software data." }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of installs have a discovery source (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations may be based on incomplete or manually entered data." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of installs have a discovery source. Now Assist SAM AI recommendations cannot be trusted without automated discovery feeding accurate install data." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure ServiceNow Discovery or an integrated discovery tool to automatically populate software install records. Manual install data is unreliable for AI analysis. Navigate to Discovery > Administration to configure software discovery.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_dbf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca3
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Discovery-sourced install data ensures Now Assist SAM AI analysis is based on accurate, current software inventory. Without automated discovery, AI recommendations are based on potentially stale or incomplete manual data, reducing the reliability of license optimization suggestions.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Discovery Integration for SAM</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_sam_sw_install"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No software install records found", finding: "No software install records found. Discovery integration cannot be assessed." }; } var gaDisc = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_sam_sw_install"); gaDisc.addQuery("discovery_source", "!=", ""); gaDisc.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaDisc.query(); var withDisc = gaDisc.next() ? parseInt(gaDisc.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withDisc / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of installs have a discovery source (" + withDisc + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of software installs have a discovery source. Now Assist SAM AI analysis is based on accurate, automatically discovered software data." }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of installs have a discovery source (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations may be based on incomplete or manually entered data." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of installs have a discovery source. Now Assist SAM AI recommendations cannot be trusted without automated discovery feeding accurate install data." }; } })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SAM</module><number>CHK0000627</number><order>1000</order><remediation_guidance>Configure ServiceNow Discovery or an integrated discovery tool to automatically populate software install records. Manual install data is unreliable for AI analysis. Navigate to Discovery > Administration to configure software discovery.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>dbf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca3</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Discovery Integration for SAM</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_dbf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca3</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
